puzzles.label: Back Rank Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook to d8 is checkmate on the back rank!

puzzles.label: Rook Corner
puzzles.hint: Rook to h8 — white king covers the escape squares.

puzzles.label: Rook + King
puzzles.hint: Rook to g8 — white king cuts off all escape.

puzzles.label: Rook Side Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook to e8 — king trapped in the corner.

puzzles.label: Rook Edge Mate
puzzles.hint: Rook to f8 — king on the edge has nowhere to go.

puzzles.label: Rook a-file
puzzles.hint: Rook to a8 — the back rank is open!

puzzles.label: Rook c8
puzzles.hint: Rook to c8 — king on b6 covers the escape.

puzzles.label: Rook g8
puzzles.hint: Rook to g8 — the king is trapped.

puzzles.label: Rook Side 2
puzzles.hint: Rook to a8 — king and rook work together.

puzzles.label: Two Rooks
puzzles.hint: Rook to a8 — the ladder mate!
